metadata.heist_focus: alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing
metadata.coordination_problem: alarm gauntlet where each role controls one failure mode: scouting, silence, blocking, or misdirection
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: huge under-mountain bells, frayed ropes, mushroom wax, goblin knots, and purple false echoes

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with huge under-mountain bells, frayed ropes, mushroom wax, goblin knots, and purple false echoes.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing.

objective_hold.name: Quiet Clapper Post
objective_hold.description: Cut out the quiet clapper, the one bell part the dwarves use to signal silent lockdowns.

furniture.name: Bell-Mouth Shadow
furniture.description: Bell-Mouth Shadow supports alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing.

furniture.message: The scout disappears inside the bell's enormous mouth.

break_effect.message: Bell-Mouth Shadow breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Main Bell Rope
furniture.description: Main Bell Rope supports alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing.

furniture.message: The bell rope is replaced with something more goblin and less useful.

break_effect.message: Main Bell Rope breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Clapper Pin Rack
furniture.description: Clapper Pin Rack supports alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing.

furniture.message: The kobold swaps the clapper pin for a bent spoon.

break_effect.message: Clapper Pin Rack breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Boggart Echo Bone
furniture.description: Boggart Echo Bone supports alarm suppression, rope cutting, vertical chokepoints, and synchronized bell silencing.

furniture.message: A false bell note runs down the wrong stair.

break_effect.message: Boggart Echo Bone breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: alarm gauntlet where each role controls one failure mode: scouting, silence, blocking, or misdirection

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Underbell Belfry lite without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Underbell Belfry route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the lite heist.
